## Step 2)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuXG5haXJmYXJlJFNNQTMgPC0gcm91bmQoVFRSOjpTTUEoYWlyZmFyZSRBaXJmYXJlLCBuID0gMyksIDIpXG5cbmFpcmZhcmVcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r

airfare$SMA3 <- round(TTR::SMA(airfare$Airfare, n = 3), 2)

airfare
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":["Year"],"name":[1],"type":["int"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["Airfare"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]},{"label":["SMA3"],"name":[3],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"2004","2":"402.26","3":"NA"},{"1":"2005","2":"391.50","3":"NA"},{"1":"2006","2":"405.48","3":"399.75"},{"1":"2007","2":"390.30","3":"395.76"},{"1":"2008","2":"400.27","3":"398.68"},{"1":"2009","2":"359.91","3":"383.49"},{"1":"2010","2":"383.48","3":"381.22"},{"1":"2011","2":"402.45","3":"381.95"},{"1":"2012","2":"406.13","3":"397.35"},{"1":"2013","2":"407.99","3":"405.52"},{"1":"2014","2":"411.67","3":"408.60"},{"1":"2015","2":"395.70","3":"405.12"},{"1":"2016","2":"361.94","3":"389.77"},{"1":"2017","2":"352.85","3":"370.16"},{"1":"2018","2":"346.49","3":"353.76"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[3]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[15]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r

forecast_2019_SMA <- mean(tail(airfare$Airfare, 3))

paste0("$", formatC(forecast_2019_SMA,
                    format = "f",
                    digits = 2,
                    big.mark = ","))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiJDM1My43NlwiXG4ifQ== -->




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
#
```

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #2:
$353.76

## Step 3)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
airfare$Error <- airfare$Airfare - airfare$SMA3

# Remove rows with NA values because not counting in 3 year simple moving average
accuracy_data <- na.omit(airfare)

MAE <- mean(abs(accuracy_data$Error))
MSE <- mean(accuracy_data$Error^2)
RMSE <- sqrt(MSE)
MAPE <- mean(abs(accuracy_data$Error / accuracy_data$Airfare)) * 100

# Printing results
cat("MAE :", round(MAE, 2), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMTAuNDEgXG4ifQ== -->

```
MAE : 10.41 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVRWTkZJRHBjSWl3Z2NtOTFibVFvVFZORkxDQXlLU3dnWENKY1hHNWNJaWxjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmNhdChcIk1TRSA6XCIsIHJvdW5kKE1TRSwgMiksIFwiXFxuXCIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

```r
cat("MSE :", round(MSE, 2), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVVrMVRSVHBjSWl3Z2NtOTFibVFvVWsxVFJTd2dNaWtzSUZ3aVhGeHVYQ0lwWEc1Z1lHQWlmUT09IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5jYXQoXCJSTVNFOlwiLCByb3VuZChSTVNFLCAyKSwgXCJcXG5cIilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

## Step 4)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Simple Exponential Smoothing with alpha = 0.2
ses_model_02 <- HoltWinters(airfare$Airfare,
                            alpha = 0.2,
                            beta = FALSE,
                            gamma = FALSE)

forecast_2019_SES02 <- predict(ses_model_02, n.ahead = 1)

forecast_2019_SES02
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiVGltZSBTZXJpZXM6XG5TdGFydCA9IDE2IFxuRW5kID0gMTYgXG5GcmVxdWVuY3kgPSAxIFxuICAgICAgICAgIGZpdFxuWzEsXSAzNzYuNjM1N1xuIn0= -->

```
Time Series:
Start = 16 
End = 16 
Frequency = 1 
          fit
[1,] 376.6357
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBVc2VkIGZvciBmb3JtYXR0aW5nXG5wYXN0ZTAoXCIkXCIsXG4gICAgICAgZm9ybWF0Qyhmb3JlY2FzdF8yMDE5X1NFUzAyLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZm9ybWF0ID0gXCJmXCIsXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICBkaWdpdHMgPSAyLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgYmlnLm1hcmsgPSBcIixcIikpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
# Used for formatting
paste0("$",
       formatC(forecast_2019_SES02,
               format = "f",
               digits = 2,
               big.mark = ","))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiJDM3Ni42NFwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "$376.64"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #4:
$376.64 is 2019 average forecast

## Step 5)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Fitted values from SES model
airfare$SES_0_2 <- c(NA, round(as.numeric(fitted(ses_model_02)[,1]), 2))

# Calculate forecast errors
airfare$Error_SES02 <- airfare$Airfare - airfare$SES_0_2

# Remove missing values as not applicable
accuracy_SES02 <- na.omit(airfare)

# Accuracy measures
MAE_SES02 <- mean(abs(accuracy_SES02$Error_SES02))
MSE_SES02 <- mean(accuracy_SES02$Error_SES02^2)
RMSE_SES02 <- sqrt(MSE_SES02)
MAPE_SES02 <- mean(abs(accuracy_SES02$Error_SES02 / accuracy_SES02$Airfare)) * 100

# Print results
cat("MAE :", round(MAE_SES02, 2), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMTguMjUgXG4ifQ== -->

```
MAE : 18.25 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVRWTkZJRHBjSWl3Z2NtOTFibVFvVFZORlgxTkZVekF5TENBeUtTd2dYQ0pjWEc1Y0lpbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTVNFIDpcIiwgcm91bmQoTVNFX1NFUzAyLCAyKSwgXCJcXG5cIilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

```r
cat("MSE :", round(MSE_SES02, 2), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTVNFIDogNTI3LjY3IFxuIn0= -->

```
MSE : 527.67 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVVrMVRSVHBjSWl3Z2NtOTFibVFvVWsxVFJWOVRSVk13TWl3Z01pa3NJRndpWEZ4dVhDSXBYRzVnWUdBaWZRPT0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmNhdChcIlJNU0U6XCIsIHJvdW5kKFJNU0VfU0VTMDIsIDIpLCBcIlxcblwiKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

```r

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUk1TRTogMjIuOTcgXG4ifQ== -->

## Step 6)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Simple Exponential Smoothing with alpha = 0.8
ses_model_08 <- HoltWinters(
  airfare$Airfare,
  alpha = 0.8,
  beta = FALSE,
  gamma = FALSE
)

# Forecast one year ahead (2019)
forecast_2019_SES08 <- predict(ses_model_08, n.ahead = 1)

forecast_2019_SES08
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiVGltZSBTZXJpZXM6XG5TdGFydCA9IDE2IFxuRW5kID0gMTYgXG5GcmVxdWVuY3kgPSAxIFxuICAgICAgICAgIGZpdFxuWzEsXSAzNDguNDE5OFxuIn0= -->

```
Time Series:
Start = 16 
End = 16 
Frequency = 1 
          fit
[1,] 348.4198
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBVc2VkIGZvciBmb3JtYXR0aW5nXG5wYXN0ZTAoXCIkXCIsXG4gICAgICAgZm9ybWF0Qyhmb3JlY2FzdF8yMDE5X1NFUzA4LFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZm9ybWF0ID0gXCJmXCIsXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICBkaWdpdHMgPSAyLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgYmlnLm1hcmsgPSBcIixcIikpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
# Used for formatting
paste0("$",
       formatC(forecast_2019_SES08,
               format = "f",
               digits = 2,
               big.mark = ","))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #6:
$348.42

## Step 7)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
airfare$SES_0_8 <- c(NA, round(as.numeric(fitted(ses_model_08)[,1]), 2))

airfare$Error_SES08 <- airfare$Airfare - airfare$SES_0_8

accuracy_SES08 <- na.omit(airfare)

MAE_SES08 <- mean(abs(accuracy_SES08$Error_SES08))
MSE_SES08 <- mean(accuracy_SES08$Error_SES08^2)
RMSE_SES08 <- sqrt(MSE_SES08)
MAPE_SES08 <- mean(abs(accuracy_SES08$Error_SES08 / accuracy_SES08$Airfare)) * 100

cat("MAE :", round(MAE_SES08, 2), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMTUuNiBcbiJ9 -->

```
MAE : 15.6 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVRWTkZJRHBjSWl3Z2NtOTFibVFvVFZORlgxTkZVekE0TENBeUtTd2dYQ0pjWEc1Y0lpbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTVNFIDpcIiwgcm91bmQoTVNFX1NFUzA4LCAyKSwgXCJcXG5cIilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTVNFIDogMzU3Ljc2IFxuIn0= -->




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
     main = "Warner Music Group Quarterly Revenue")

     at = 1:nrow(warner),

     las = 2,
     cex.axis = 0.7)
```

### Quiz Question #9:
There is an upward trend and a seasonal pattern.

## Step 9)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxud2FybmVyJFRyZW5kIDwtIDE6bnJvdyh3YXJuZXIpXG5cbnRyZW5kX21vZGVsIDwtIGxtKFJldmVudWUgfiBUcmVuZCwgZGF0YSA9IHdhcm5lcilcblxuc3VtbWFyeSh0cmVuZF9tb2RlbClcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
warner$Trend <- 1:nrow(warner)

trend_model <- lm(Revenue ~ Trend, data = warner)

summary(trend_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

Call:
lm(formula = Revenue ~ Trend, data = warner)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-184.97  -44.21   -4.36   52.27  147.17 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)  731.170     30.981   23.60  < 2e-16 ***
Trend         23.190      2.084   11.13 9.82e-11 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 75.14 on 23 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.8433,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.8365 
F-statistic: 123.8 on 1 and 23 DF,  p-value: 9.816e-11
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjbTkxYm1Rb1kyOWxaaWgwY21WdVpGOXRiMlJsYkNrc0lESXBYRzVnWUdBaWZRPT0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnJvdW5kKGNvZWYodHJlbmRfbW9kZWwpLCAyKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucm91bmQoY29lZih0cmVuZF9tb2RlbCksIDIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
round(coef(trend_model), 2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiKEludGVyY2VwdCkgICAgICAgVHJlbmQgXG4gICAgIDczMS4xNyAgICAgICAyMy4xOSBcbiJ9 -->

```
(Intercept)       Trend 
     731.17       23.19 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #10: 
The slope coefficient for the trend variable is 23.19

## Step 10)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
warner$Predicted_Trend <- predict(trend_model)

warner$Error <- warner$Revenue - warner$Predicted_Trend

MAE <- mean(abs(warner$Error))
MSE <- mean(warner$Error^2)
RMSE <- sqrt(MSE)
MAPE <- mean(abs(warner$Error / warner$Revenue)) * 100

cat("MAE :", sprintf("%.2f", MAE), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogNTQuNjYgXG4ifQ== -->

```
MAE : 54.66 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

## Step 11)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxud2FybmVyJFNlYXNvbiA8LSBzdWJzdHIod2FybmVyJFF1YXJ0ZXIsIDUsIDYpXG5cbnRhYmxlKHdhcm5lciRTZWFzb24pXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
warner$Season <- substr(warner$Quarter, 5, 6)

table(warner$Season)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG5RMSBRMiBRMyBRNCBcbiA2ICA2ICA2ICA3IFxuIn0= -->

```

Q1 Q2 Q3 Q4 
 6  6  6  7 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYWdncmVnYXRlKFJldmVudWUgfiBTZWFzb24sIGRhdGEgPSB3YXJuZXIsIG1lYW4pXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
aggregate(Revenue ~ Season, data = warner, mean)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":["Season"],"name":[1],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["Revenue"],"name":[2],"type":["dbl"],"align":["right"]}],"data":[{"1":"Q1","2":"1100.8333"},{"1":"Q2","2":"990.6667"},{"1":"Q3","2":"1015.6667"},{"1":"Q4","2":"1024.7143"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[2]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[4]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r

# Set the reference quarter and setting Q4 as it has the highest revenue
warner$Season <- relevel(factor(warner$Season), ref = "Q4")

season_model <- lm(Revenue ~ Trend + Season, data = warner)

summary(season_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

Call:
lm(formula = Revenue ~ Trend + Season, data = warner)

Residuals:
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-148.483  -12.503    4.075   21.305   86.305 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)  715.278     28.333  25.245  < 2e-16 ***
Trend         23.803      1.508  15.784 9.37e-13 ***
SeasonQ1      99.922     30.148   3.314  0.00346 ** 
SeasonQ2     -34.048     30.110  -1.131  0.27153    
SeasonQ3     -32.850     30.148  -1.090  0.28882    
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 54.12 on 20 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.9293,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.9152 
F-statistic: 65.75 on 4 and 20 DF,  p-value: 3.197e-11
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjbTkxYm1Rb1kyOWxaaWh6WldGemIyNWZiVzlrWld3cExDQXlLVnh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnJvdW5kKGNvZWYoc2Vhc29uX21vZGVsKSwgMilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucm91bmQoY29lZihzZWFzb25fbW9kZWwpLCAyKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
round(coef(season_model), 2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiKEludGVyY2VwdCkgICAgICAgVHJlbmQgICAgU2Vhc29uUTEgICAgU2Vhc29uUTIgICAgU2Vhc29uUTMgXG4gICAgIDcxNS4yOCAgICAgICAyMy44MCAgICAgICA5OS45MiAgICAgIC0zNC4wNSAgICAgIC0zMi44NSBcbiJ9 -->

```
(Intercept)       Trend    SeasonQ1    SeasonQ2    SeasonQ3 
     715.28       23.80       99.92      -34.05      -32.85 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #12:
Holding the trend constant, the average revenue in Quarter 2 is estimated to be 34.05 million USD lower than the average revenue in Quarter 4 (the reference quarter).

## Step 12)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
warner$Predicted_Season <- predict(season_model)

warner$Error_Season <- warner$Revenue - warner$Predicted_Season

MAE_Season <- mean(abs(warner$Error_Season))
MSE_Season <- mean(warner$Error_Season^2)
RMSE_Season <- sqrt(MSE_Season)
MAPE_Season <- mean(abs(warner$Error_Season / warner$Revenue)) * 100

cat("MAE :", sprintf("%.2f", MAE_Season), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMzQuMDMgXG4ifQ== -->

```
MAE : 34.03 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTVNFIDpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgTVNFX1NlYXNvbiksIFwiXFxuXCIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
cat("MSE :", sprintf("%.2f", MSE_Season), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTVNFIDogMjM0My4yMyBcbiJ9 -->

```
MSE : 2343.23 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiUk1TRTpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgUk1TRV9TZWFzb24pLCBcIlxcblwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
cat("RMSE:", sprintf("%.2f", RMSE_Season), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUk1TRTogNDguNDEgXG4ifQ== -->

```
RMSE: 48.41 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTUFQRTpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgTUFQRV9TZWFzb24pLCBcIiVcXG5cIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
cat("MAPE:", sprintf("%.2f", MAPE_Season), "%\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFQRTogMy4yMiAlXG4ifQ== -->

```
MAPE: 3.22 %
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #13:
RMSE value is 48.41

### Quiz Question #14:
The regression model including both trend and seasonality provides a better fit and more accurate forecasts than the model using trend only as we can see the rmse from step 12 is quite lower than the rmse calculated in step 10.

## Step 13)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
future <- data.frame(
  Trend = (nrow(warner)+1):(nrow(warner)+4),
  Season = factor(c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"),
                  levels = levels(warner$Season))
)

future$Forecast <- predict(season_model, newdata = future)

# Round to two decimal places
future$Forecast <- round(future$Forecast, 2)

future
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

## Step 14)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
plot(aws$Revenue,
     type = "o",
     col = "firebrick",
     pch = 16,
     lwd = 2,
     xaxt = "n",
     xlab = "Quarter",
     ylab = "Revenue (Million USD)",
     main = "Amazon Web Services Quarterly Revenue")

axis(1,
     at = 1:nrow(aws),
     labels = aws$Quarter,
     las = 2,
     cex.axis = 0.7)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVYRzVuY21sa0tHTnZiQ0E5SUZ3aVozSmhlVGcxWENJc0lHeDBlU0E5SUZ3aVpHOTBkR1ZrWENJcFhHNWNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuXG5ncmlkKGNvbCA9IFwiZ3JheTg1XCIsIGx0eSA9IFwiZG90dGVkXCIpXG5cbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

## Step 15)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYXdzJFRyZW5kIDwtIDE6bnJvdyhhd3MpXG5cbnRyZW5kX21vZGVsX2F3cyA8LSBsbShSZXZlbnVlIH4gVHJlbmQsIGRhdGEgPSBhd3MpXG5cbnN1bW1hcnkodHJlbmRfbW9kZWxfYXdzKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
aws$Trend <- 1:nrow(aws)

trend_model_aws <- lm(Revenue ~ Trend, data = aws)

summary(trend_model_aws)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

Call:
lm(formula = Revenue ~ Trend, data = aws)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-1383.7  -980.9  -405.7   705.8  3486.0 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)  -1638.4      457.5  -3.581  0.00119 ** 
Trend          497.9       24.2  20.575  < 2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 1264 on 30 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.9338,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.9316 
F-statistic: 423.3 on 1 and 30 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjbTkxYm1Rb1kyOWxaaWgwY21WdVpGOXRiMlJsYkY5aGQzTXBMQ0F5S1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5yb3VuZChjb2VmKHRyZW5kX21vZGVsX2F3cyksIDIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucm91bmQoY29lZih0cmVuZF9tb2RlbF9hd3MpLCAyKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
round(coef(trend_model_aws), 2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiKEludGVyY2VwdCkgICAgICAgVHJlbmQgXG4gICAtMTYzOC40MCAgICAgIDQ5Ny44OSBcbiJ9 -->

```
(Intercept)       Trend 
   -1638.40      497.89 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #16:
497.89 is the slope coefficient for the trend variable

## Step 16)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r

aws$Predicted_Trend <- predict(trend_model_aws)

aws$Error <- aws$Revenue - aws$Predicted_Trend

MAE <- mean(abs(aws$Error))
MSE <- mean(aws$Error^2)
RMSE <- sqrt(MSE)
MAPE <- mean(abs(aws$Error / aws$Revenue)) * 100

cat("MAE :", sprintf("%.2f", MAE), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMTAxMC4wMyBcbiJ9 -->

```
MAE : 1010.03 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMkYwS0Z3aVRWTkZJRHBjSWl3Z2MzQnlhVzUwWmloY0lpVXVNbVpjSWl3Z1RWTkZLU3dnWENKY1hHNWNJaWxjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmNhdChcIk1TRSA6XCIsIHNwcmludGYoXCIlLjJmXCIsIE1TRSksIFwiXFxuXCIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

```r
cat("MSE :", sprintf("%.2f", MSE), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTVNFIDogMTQ5NzYzOC4wNCBcbiJ9 -->

```
MSE : 1497638.04 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiUk1TRTpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgUk1TRSksIFwiXFxuXCIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->


### Quiz Question #17:

## Step 17)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYXdzJFRyZW5kMiA8LSBhd3MkVHJlbmReMlxuXG4jIFF1YWRyYXRpYyByZWdyZXNzaW9uXG5xdWFkX21vZGVsIDwtIGxtKFJldmVudWUgfiBUcmVuZCArIFRyZW5kMiwgZGF0YSA9IGF3cylcblxuc3VtbWFyeShxdWFkX21vZGVsKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
aws$Trend2 <- aws$Trend^2

# Quadratic regression
quad_model <- lm(Revenue ~ Trend + Trend2, data = aws)

summary(quad_model)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

Call:
lm(formula = Revenue ~ Trend + Trend2, data = aws)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-592.68 -160.52   -0.69  163.99 1073.25 

Coefficients:
             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept) 1272.5131   181.0411   7.029 9.91e-08 ***
Trend        -15.8049    25.2926  -0.625    0.537    
Trend2        15.5664     0.7436  20.934  < 2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 320.3 on 29 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.9959,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.9956 
F-statistic:  3516 on 2 and 29 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjbTkxYm1Rb1kyOWxaaWh4ZFdGa1gyMXZaR1ZzS1N3Z01pbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxucm91bmQoY29lZihxdWFkX21vZGVsKSwgMilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucm91bmQoY29lZihxdWFkX21vZGVsKSwgMilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
round(coef(quad_model), 2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiKEludGVyY2VwdCkgICAgICAgVHJlbmQgICAgICBUcmVuZDIgXG4gICAgMTI3Mi41MSAgICAgIC0xNS44MCAgICAgICAxNS41NyBcbiJ9 -->

```
(Intercept)       Trend      Trend2 
    1272.51      -15.80       15.57 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
plot(aws$Trend,
     aws$Revenue,
     pch = 16,
     col = "firebrick",
     xlab = "Trend",
     ylab = "Revenue (Million USD)",
     main = "Quadratic Trend - Amazon Web Services")

lines(aws$Trend,
      predict(quad_model),
      col = "red",
      lwd = 2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVYRzVuY21sa0tHTnZiQ0E5SUZ3aVozSmhlVGcxWENJc0lHeDBlU0E5SUZ3aVpHOTBkR1ZrWENJcFhHNWNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuXG5ncmlkKGNvbCA9IFwiZ3JheTg1XCIsIGx0eSA9IFwiZG90dGVkXCIpXG5cbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

```r

grid(col = "gray85", lty = "dotted")

```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQzMi42MzI5LCJ3aWR0aCI6NzAwLCJkcGkiOi0xLCJzaXplX2JlaGF2aW9yIjowLCJjb25kaXRpb25zIjpbXX0= -->

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Quiz Question #18: 
As you can see from the plot that the revenue is increasing over time it is an accelerating growth so a quadratic regression is the most appropriate model for this analysis.

## Step 18)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
aws$Predicted_Quad <- predict(quad_model)

aws$Error_Quad <- aws$Revenue - aws$Predicted_Quad

MAE_Quad <- mean(abs(aws$Error_Quad))
MSE_Quad <- mean(aws$Error_Quad^2)
RMSE_Quad <- sqrt(MSE_Quad)
MAPE_Quad <- mean(abs(aws$Error_Quad / aws$Revenue)) * 100

cat("MAE :", sprintf("%.2f", MAE_Quad), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTUFFIDogMjE2LjE0IFxuIn0= -->

```
MAE : 216.14 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTVNFIDpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgTVNFX1F1YWQpLCBcIlxcblwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
cat("MSE :", sprintf("%.2f", MSE_Quad), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiTVNFIDogOTI5NTEuMTMgXG4ifQ== -->

```
MSE : 92951.13 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiUk1TRTpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgUk1TRV9RdWFkKSwgXCJcXG5cIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
cat("RMSE:", sprintf("%.2f", RMSE_Quad), "\n")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUk1TRTogMzA0Ljg4IFxuIn0= -->

```
RMSE: 304.88 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuY2F0KFwiTUFQRTpcIiwgc3ByaW50ZihcIiUuMmZcIiwgTUFQRV9RdWFkKSwgXCIlXFxuXCIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

### Quiz Question #19:

## Step 19)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
future_aws <- data.frame(
  Trend = (nrow(warner)+1):(nrow(warner)+4)
)

future_aws$Trend2 <- future_aws$Trend^2

future_aws$Forecast <- predict(quad_model, newdata = future_aws)

future_aws$Forecast <- round(future_aws$Forecast, 2)

future_aws
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

  </script>
